seoTitle: How to Add and Create a Task in ClickUp
metaDescription: Learn how to create a new task in ClickUp using the quick-add button or keyboard shortcut, then fill in details and route it to the right list.
intro: Capturing an idea before it slips your mind matters, especially when you're juggling several projects at once. This guide walks through the fastest ways to create a task in ClickUp, from clicking the quick-add button to using a global keyboard shortcut, then filling in the essentials like due dates, assignees, and which list the task belongs in.

steps.heading: Click the quick-add task button
steps.body: Find the '+ Task' button in the bottom quick-action bar of your workspace to open the task creation window.

steps.heading: Use a keyboard shortcut for speed
steps.body: Press the global hotkey from any screen to instantly trigger the task creation popup without navigating menus first.

steps.heading: Fill in the title, description, and assignee
steps.body: Type a clear task title, add details in the description field, and tag the teammate responsible in the assignee box.

steps.heading: Set dates and priority
steps.body: Click the calendar icon to set a start date, due date, or reminder, and mark the task's priority level.

steps.heading: Use ClickUp Brain to draft subtasks
steps.body: Access the Brain assist tool to automatically generate a related checklist based on the task's description.

steps.heading: Choose the destination list
steps.body: Use the folder tree dropdown to route your new task into the correct Space, Folder, or List before creating it.

faq.question: Can I create a task without assigning it right away?
faq.answer: Yes, assigning a task is optional at creation, and you can add or change the assignee later from the task card.

faq.question: Is there a shortcut to add a task from anywhere?
faq.answer: Yes, ClickUp supports a global keyboard shortcut that opens the task creation popup from any screen in the workspace.

faq.question: Can I use a template when creating a task?
faq.answer: Yes, template presets let you spin up tasks with pre-configured fields and structures instead of starting from scratch each time.

faq.question: Does ClickUp Brain automatically break tasks into subtasks?
faq.answer: You can use the Brain assist tool to generate a suggested checklist based on your task description, which you can then adjust as needed.
